reviews.review_description: It's all right The graphics all right but if you don't have your VR legs you're going to get sick motion sickness for sure The graphics is okay The steering wheel is okay it's just the cars be sliding too much in a jerk around too much to the point you'll get sick then when you open the second stage and it freezes up I deleted it reinstalled it and it keeps going freezing that's frustrating and then the car doesn't adjust to your height I was sitting in the chair trying to adjust it won't do nothing stay in the same position I literally had to sit on the floor just to play the game I haven't said on the couch and see what I do any good didn't ingest it I even stood up to adjust it to my height so I can sit down into the inside the car didn't work I got a migraine headache playing this please let me get a refund I feel sick just right in this review about to throw up
